form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 330m at this track beaten 9 lengths (19.15) behind Nangar Mcgraw in a Grade 4 on April 1. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 1, scoring two times. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 330m at this track beaten 9 lengths (19.15) behind Nangar Mcgraw in a Grade 4 on April 1. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 1, scoring two times. Go close.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.73) at this track in a NG, finishing eighth and beaten 12 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and seven places from 11 starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.73) at this track in a NG, finishing eighth and beaten 12 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and seven places from 11 starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.45) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and six minors. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.45) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and six minors. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (19.48) in a GR 4/5 at this track. Makes return after a three-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (19.48) in a GR 4/5 at this track. Makes return after a three-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (19.24) over 330m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (19.24) over 330m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide in the home straight and checked off the heels.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at this track when only a neck from the winner but did record a blistering 18.78 over the 330m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Narrowly beaten last time at this track when only a neck from the winner but did record a blistering 18.78 over the 330m journey. Harder here and one for the multiples.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (19.11) over 330m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and appears tested on latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (19.11) over 330m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.25) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from seven starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (19.25) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from seven starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 4 over 390m at Shepparton behind Spanish Armada beaten 5 lengths (22.80) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Has run slick time here with a 18.93 PB at the distance. Go close.

form.formComment: Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on March 25 over 330m at this track behind Armoured Glass beaten 10 lengths (19.64). More than capable and well placed to find his best form.
